patch.value: Scope: inspect the latest checkout, run a temporary-project dogfood pass, review code quality and performance, validate SDK/extension ergonomics, search/indexing behavior, calendar output, telemetry/Sentry operations, CI/CD hygiene, and record any remediations. Sensitive operational details must stay out of tracked files and item text.
Full latest-state audit and remediation for pm CLI extensibility, SDK, agent UX, calendar, semantic search, telemetry/Sentry, CI/CD, security hygiene, and temporary-project dogfooding.

Baseline build/tests pass; temporary-project dogfood exercises core workflows; SDK/extensibility/search/calendar/telemetry/CI findings are reviewed; code fixes are linked and verified; no host credentials or tokens are tracked or recorded.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Duplicate check before create: ran pm context --limit 10,pm list-open --limit 20,pm list-in-progress --limit 20,pm search latest audit/sdk/search/calendar/telemetry/ci terms. Existing relevant items were closed prior audits; no open/in-progress item covered this latest-state request,so a new audit lineage is required.
